firstName.description: The first name, or given name, of the guest.

lastName.description: The last name, or surname, of the guest.

phone.description: The telephone number of the guest.

phoneCountryCode.description: The international phone country code for the number of the guest.

email.description:
The email address corresponding to the guest who placed the order.

The email address is the key that identifies a unique restaurant guest. All distinct guests should have distinct email addresses.
